title: jurinea prokhanovii var. giseldonica
intro: Jurinea prokhanovii var. giseldonica, also known as a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is a variant of Jurinea prokhanovii, a plant that is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots which are rich in sesquiterpene lactones. The roots of Jurinea prokhanovii var. giseldonica have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, pain, and fever, due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. Herbal preparations of Jurinea prokhanovii var. giseldonica, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to provide relief from these conditions, and its extracts are also used in pharmaceutical applications.
